zh.lifeSummary: 當William Stoddard於大約1504年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾利可時，他的父親Hugh Stoddard20歲，母親Ann Rushton16歲。他於1530年與Lady Emma Cheeseman在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾盧申頓享年55歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stoddard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for someone who looked after a stud of horses, from Middle English and Older Scots stod(e), stud(e) ‘establishment where horses were bred’, ‘herd of stallions or mares’ + herd(e) ‘herdsman’.

English: variant of Stothard, an occupational name for a keeper of cattle or horses, from Middle English stot ‘steer, bullock’ or ‘horse’ + herd(e) ‘herdsman’. The name was probably confused with Stodeherd ‘keeper of stud-horses’ (see above).

History: The Stoddard family of Boston, MA, was introduced by Anthony Stoddard (1600–1686), who settled there in 1639. Solomon Stoddard (1643–1728/9) was a prominent Congregational clergyman in MA, the grandfather of Jonathan Edwards, and progenitor of many noted descendants.

variants.name: Stodden
meanings: perhaps occasionally a habitational name from Studding's Farm in Herstmonceux (Sussex), probably named with Old English stōd ‘stud, herd of horses’ + denn ‘pasture’. Compare Stoddard .

variants.name: Stoddart
meanings: English (Durham and Cumberland) and Scottish (Midlothian and Lanarkshire): variant of   Stoddard  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When William Stoddard was born about 1504, in Leek, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh Stoddard, was 20 and his mother, Ann Rushton, was 16. He married Lady Emma Cheeseman in 1530, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1558, in Rushton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Stoddard est né environ 1504, à Leek, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Stoddard, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Ann Rushton, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Lady Emma Cheeseman en 1530, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1558, à Rushton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Stoddard um 1504 in Leek, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Stoddard 20 und seine Mutter Ann Rushton 16. Er hat 1530 in England Lady Emma Cheeseman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1558 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Rushton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Staffordshire, England begraben.

Morì nel 1558, nel Rushton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Stoddardが約1504年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアリークで生まれた時，父Hugh Stoddardは20歳，母Ann Rushtonは16歳であった。1530年にイギリスでLady Emma Cheesemanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1558年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアルシュトンで55歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Stoddard(이)가 대략 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 리크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Stoddard(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Rushton(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1530년 영국에서 Lady Emma Cheeseman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 러슈턴에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Emma Cheeseman em 1530, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Stoddard родился около 1504 г. в местности лик, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh Stoddard было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Rushton, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Emma Cheeseman в 1530 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1558 г. в местности руштон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности стаффордшир, Англия.
